props.name: data
props.description: Array of datasets — one per layer. A single line uses `[data]`.

props.name: options
props.description: Visual options override — colours per layer, stroke width, area fill, stacking, entrance animation, smoothing.

props.name: label
props.description: Display label shown in the tooltip (e.g. "BTC", "Revenue").

props.name: colors
props.description: One color per layer.

props.name: strokeWidth
props.description: Stroke width in CSS pixels. Default: 1. `0` hides the line stroke.

props.name: area
props.description: Area-fill configuration. Default: `{ visible: true }`.

props.name: visible
props.description: Whether the area gradient under the line is rendered. Default: `true`.

props.name: pulse
props.description: Whether to show an animated pulsing dot at the last data point.

props.name: pulseMs
props.description:
Period of one halo pulse cycle in milliseconds. Continuous loop, not a
one-shot — short values pulse fast, long values pulse slowly. Default:
`600` (≈ 1.7 Hz, a calm "breathing" rhythm).

```
// Per-series override:
<LineSeries options={{ pulseMs: 1200 }} data={data} />

// Chart-level default:
<ChartContainer animations={{ points: { pulseMs: 1200 } }}>
  <LineSeries data={data} />
</ChartContainer>
```

`false` or `0` turns the halo off entirely (drawing and animation loop).
A chart-level `animations.points: false` is a hard disable that wins
over this field.

props.name: stacking
props.description: Stacking mode. Default: 'off'.

props.name: entryAnimation
props.description:
Entrance animation style for new points. Style is specific to the line
series; there is no chart-level override for style — only for duration.
Default: `'grow'`.
see: entryMs — cross-linked duration for this animation.

props.name: entryMs
props.description:
Per-point entrance duration in milliseconds. Default: `250`.

```
// Override for one series:
<LineSeries options={{ entryMs: 600 }} data={data} />

// Or set the default for every series at once:
<ChartContainer animations={{ points: { enterMs: 600 } }}>
  <LineSeries data={data} />
</ChartContainer>
```

Note: chart-level uses `enterMs`, per-series uses `entryMs` — same
animation, two names for historical reasons.

`false` or `0` disables the entrance (equivalent to
`entryAnimation: 'none'`). A chart-level `animations.points: false` is a
hard disable that wins over this field.

props.name: smoothMs
props.description:
How long the displayed last value takes to catch up to the actual one
on every `updateLastPoint`. Default: `250` ms.

```
// Per-series override:
<LineSeries options={{ smoothMs: 100 }} data={data} />

// Chart-level default:
<ChartContainer animations={{ points: { smoothMs: 100 } }}>
  <LineSeries data={data} />
</ChartContainer>
```

`0` or `false` snaps the displayed value to the target on every tick
(no smoothing). A chart-level `animations.points: false` is a hard
disable that wins over this field.

props.name: id
props.description: Stable series ID — same value across remounts.

props.name: data
props.description: Array of datasets — one per layer. A single-layer bar chart uses `[data]`.

props.name: options
props.description: Visual options override — colours per layer, bar-width ratio, stacking, entrance animation, smoothing.

props.name: label
props.description: Display label shown in the tooltip (e.g. "Volume").

props.name: colors
props.description: One color per layer.

props.name: barWidthRatio
props.description: Width of each bar as a fraction of the available bar slot (0–1). `1` = bars touch; `0.6` = roughly 60 % of the slot. Default: 0.7.

props.name: stacking
props.description: Stacking mode. Default: 'off'.

props.name: entryAnimation
props.description:
Entrance animation style for newly appended bars. Style is specific to
the bar series; there is no chart-level override for style — only for
duration. Default: `'fade-grow'`.
see: entryMs — cross-linked duration for this animation.

props.name: entryMs
props.description:
Per-bar entrance duration in milliseconds. Default: `250`.

```
// Override for one series:
<BarSeries options={{ entryMs: 600 }} data={data} />

// Or set the default for every series at once:
<ChartContainer animations={{ points: { enterMs: 600 } }}>
  <BarSeries data={data} />
</ChartContainer>
```

Note: chart-level uses `enterMs`, per-series uses `entryMs` — same
animation, two names for historical reasons.

`false` or `0` disables the entrance (equivalent to
`entryAnimation: 'none'`). A chart-level `animations.points: false` is a
hard disable that wins over this field.

props.name: smoothMs
props.description:
How long the displayed bar value takes to catch up to the actual one
on every `updateLastPoint`. Default: `250` ms.

```
// Per-series override:
<BarSeries options={{ smoothMs: 100 }} data={data} />

// Chart-level default:
<ChartContainer animations={{ points: { smoothMs: 100 } }}>
  <BarSeries data={data} />
</ChartContainer>
```

`0` or `false` snaps the displayed value to the target on every tick
(no smoothing). A chart-level `animations.points: false` is a hard
disable that wins over this field.

props.name: id
props.description: Stable series ID — same value across remounts.

props.name: data
props.description: OHLC candles to render. Each element carries `time/open/high/low/close` and an optional `volume`.

props.name: options
props.description: Visual options override — colours, body width, entrance animation, smoothing. Merged onto theme defaults.

props.name: label
props.description: Display label shown in the tooltip.

props.name: up
props.description: Colours for bullish candles (close ≥ open).

props.name: body
props.description: Body fill — single colour for flat, `[top, bottom]` tuple for a 2-stop vertical gradient.

props.name: wick
props.description: Wick stroke colour.

props.name: down
props.description: Colours for bearish candles (close < open).

props.name: body
props.description: Body fill — single colour for flat, `[top, bottom]` tuple for a 2-stop vertical gradient.

props.name: wick
props.description: Wick stroke colour.

props.name: bodyWidthRatio
props.description: Width of candle body as a fraction of the available bar slot (0-1).

props.name: entryAnimation
props.description:
Entrance animation style for newly appended candles. Style is specific to
the candlestick; there is no chart-level override for style — only for
duration. Default: `'unfold'`.
see: entryMs — cross-linked duration for this animation.

props.name: entryMs
props.description:
Per-candle entrance duration in milliseconds. Default: `250`.

```
// Override for one series:
<CandlestickSeries options={{ entryMs: 600 }} data={data} />

// Or set the default for every series at once:
<ChartContainer animations={{ points: { enterMs: 600 } }}>
  <CandlestickSeries data={data} />
</ChartContainer>
```

Note: chart-level uses `enterMs`, per-series uses `entryMs` — same
animation, two names for historical reasons.

`false` or `0` disables the entrance (equivalent to
`entryAnimation: 'none'`). A chart-level `animations.points: false` is a
hard disable that wins over this field.

props.name: smoothMs
props.description:
How long the displayed OHLC takes to catch up to the actual last value
on every `updateLastPoint`. Default: `250` ms.

```
// Per-series override:
<CandlestickSeries options={{ smoothMs: 100 }} data={data} />

// Chart-level default:
<ChartContainer animations={{ points: { smoothMs: 100 } }}>
  <CandlestickSeries data={data} />
</ChartContainer>
```

`0` or `false` snaps the displayed value to the target on every tick
(no smoothing). A chart-level `animations.points: false` is a hard
disable that wins over this field.

props.name: id
props.description: Stable series ID — same value across remounts.

PieSeries.description: Pie chart series. Set `options.innerRadiusRatio` > 0 for donut.

props.name: data
props.description: Slices to render. A flat array of `{ label, value, color? }` entries.

props.name: options
props.description: Visual options override — palette, donut hole, slice gap, label rendering, hover/entrance animations.

props.name: colors
props.description: Palette fallback (defaults to theme.seriesColors).

props.name: innerRadiusRatio
props.description: 0 = pie, 0.6 = donut. Fraction of the outer radius used as an inner hole.

props.name: padAngle
props.description: Gap between slices in degrees. Default: 1.15° (≈ 0.02 rad).

props.name: label
props.description: Display the label shown in the tooltip.

props.name: sliceLabels
props.description: Per-slice label rendering on the pie itself. See {@link PieLabelsOptions}.

props.name: mode
props.description: Default: `'outside'`.

props.name: content
props.description: What to display per label. Default: `'both'` (e.g. `"BTC  42%"`).

props.name: fontSize
props.description: Font size in CSS pixels. Default: 11.

props.name: minSliceAngle
props.description:
Slices narrower than this (in degrees) get no on-pie label. Default: 2.5°
(≈ 0.7% of the pie). Raise when many tiny slices would crowd the
de-cluster pass into unreadable overlaps.

props.name: elbowLen
props.description: Leader-line radial segment length in CSS pixels. Default: 12.

props.name: legPad
props.description: Gap between leader line and text in CSS pixels. Default: 6.

props.name: distance
props.description:
Radial distance in CSS pixels from the pie's outer edge to the natural
label anchor point. The label then extends horizontally outward by
{@link railWidth} before the text starts. Clamped internally against
{@link elbowLen}. Default: 14.

props.name: railWidth
props.description:
Horizontal length of the final leader-line segment in CSS pixels — the
straight tail that runs from the radial elbow out to the text anchor.
Higher values give a longer visible "rail" before the label. Default: 16.

props.name: labelGap
props.description:
Minimum vertical gap between adjacent outside labels on the same side,
expressed as a multiplier of {@link fontSize}. Default: 1.8.

props.name: balanceSides
props.deprecated:
No effect in the radial per-slice layout. A label's X is
pinned to its slice midangle, so forcing the "other" side would flip
text direction without moving the label and push text across the pie.
Kept in the option surface for backwards compatibility.

props.name: animate
props.description:
When `true`, enables pie motion effects: the outside-label entrance
draw-in on mount / data swap, and the hover-explode slice offset.
Default: `false` — labels paint fully on the first frame and hovered
slices stay in place (hover feedback is left to the tooltip / legend /
cursor). Enable for presentations where the motion adds narrative
value.

props.name: shadow
props.type: boolean | { color?: string; blur?: number; offsetX?: number; offsetY?: number; }
props.description:
Ambient *outer* drop-shadow behind each slice. Adds lift for flat
dashboards. Omit / `false` to disable (default). `true` uses soft
defaults; pass an object to tune individually.

props.name: innerShadow
props.description:
Inner rim darkening — a dark band near each slice's outer edge that
gives the pie an "inset" / pressed look. Implemented by extending the
per-slice radial gradient with a dark edge stop, so it pairs naturally
with the existing depth gradient. Omit / `false` to disable (default).

props.name: id
props.description: Stable series ID — same value across remounts.

props.name: data
props.description: Data points plotted by the sparkline. A flat `TimePoint[]` — the sparkline only ever shows one tiny line/bar.

props.name: theme
props.description: Visual theme. Drives series colour, background gradient, and the change-direction colours used in the value block.

props.name: background
props.description: Page/container background

props.name: chartGradient
props.description: Chart area gradient [top, bottom] — subtle vignette for depth

props.name: typography
props.description: Font family and base size used across the chart's text.

props.name: fontFamily
props.description: CSS `font-family` stack applied to all text rendered by the chart.

props.name: fontSize
props.description: Base body font size — titles, infobar, pie tooltip/legend default to this.

props.name: grid
props.description: Grid line appearance in the chart area.

props.name: color
props.description: Grid line stroke colour.

props.name: style
props.description: Grid line dash pattern.

props.name: candlestick
props.type: { up: { body: string | [string, string]; wick: string; }; down: { body: string | [string, string]; wick: string; }; }
props.description:
OHLC candlestick colors. `wick` defaults to `body` in {@link createTheme }
when omitted, so most presets only need to set the body colors.

`body` shape encodes the fill: a single color renders flat; a
`[top, bottom]` tuple renders a 2-stop vertical gradient. Presets that
want the subtle lightened/darkened look pass `autoGradient(color)`.

props.name: up
props.description: Bullish candle (close ≥ open).

props.name: body
props.description: Body fill — single colour for flat, `[top, bottom]` tuple for a 2-stop vertical gradient.

props.name: wick
props.description: Wick stroke colour.

props.name: down
props.description: Bearish candle (close < open).

props.name: body
props.description: Body fill — single colour for flat, `[top, bottom]` tuple for a 2-stop vertical gradient.

props.name: wick
props.description: Wick stroke colour.

props.name: line
props.type: { color: string; width: number; areaTopColor: string; areaBottomColor: string; }
props.description: Default line series appearance including area gradient fill.

props.name: color
props.description: Stroke colour of the line.

props.name: width
props.description: Stroke width in CSS pixels.

props.name: areaTopColor
props.description: Top stop of the area-fill vertical gradient (closest to the line).

props.name: areaBottomColor
props.description: Bottom stop of the area-fill vertical gradient (closest to the X axis).

props.name: seriesColors
props.description: Color palette for multi-series charts (stacked bars, overlays).

props.name: bands
props.description: Bollinger band / envelope fill colors.

props.name: upper
props.description: Fill for the upper band region (above the middle band).

props.name: lower
props.description: Fill for the lower band region (below the middle band).

props.name: crosshair
props.type: { color: string; labelBackground: string; labelTextColor: string; }
props.description: Crosshair line and axis label styling.

props.name: color
props.description: Stroke colour of the crosshair lines.

props.name: labelBackground
props.description: Background fill of the X/Y axis label pills shown at the crosshair position.

props.name: labelTextColor
props.description: Text colour inside the crosshair axis label pills.

props.name: axis
props.type: { fontSize: number; textColor: string; x?: { fontSize?: number; textColor?: string; }; y?: { fontSize?: number; textColor?: string; }; }
props.description:
Axis tick styling. `fontSize` and `textColor` are the shared defaults used
for both X and Y, as well as non-axis label surfaces (legend, crosshair
labels, sparkline ticks). Set `x` / `y` only when a specific axis needs to
diverge.

props.name: fontSize
props.description: Default tick-label font size shared by both axes.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Default tick-label colour shared by both axes.

props.name: x
props.description: Override the shared defaults on the X axis only.

props.name: fontSize
props.description: X-axis tick-label font size. Falls back to `axis.fontSize`.

props.name: textColor
props.description: X-axis tick-label colour. Falls back to `axis.textColor`.

props.name: y
props.description: Override the shared defaults on the Y axis only.

props.name: fontSize
props.description: Y-axis tick-label font size. Falls back to `axis.fontSize`.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Y-axis tick-label colour. Falls back to `axis.textColor`.

props.name: yLabel
props.type: { fontSize: number; upBackground: string; downBackground: string; neutralBackground: string; textColor: string; }
props.description: Floating label shown at the current value level on the Y axis.

props.name: fontSize
props.description: Font size of the value text inside the floating Y label.

props.name: upBackground
props.description: Pill background when the latest delta is positive.

props.name: downBackground
props.description: Pill background when the latest delta is negative.

props.name: neutralBackground
props.description: Pill background when the latest delta is zero / unknown.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Text colour inside the floating Y label pill.

props.name: tooltip
props.type: { fontSize: number; background: string; textColor: string; borderColor: string; }
props.description: Hover tooltip styling.

props.name: fontSize
props.description: Tooltip body font size.

props.name: background
props.description: Tooltip background fill.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Tooltip text colour.

props.name: borderColor
props.description: Tooltip outer border colour.

props.name: navigator
props.type: { height: number; background: string; borderColor: string; line: { color: string; width: number; areaTopColor: string; areaBottomColor: string; }; candlestick: { up: { body: string | [string, string]; wick: string; }; down: { body: string | [string, string]; wick: string; }; }; window: { fill: string; border: string; borderWidth: number; }; handle: { color: string; width: number; }; mask: { fill: string; }; }
props.description:
Navigator strip shown below the main chart — a miniature overview with a
draggable window indicating the visible range.

The `candlestick` shape mirrors the root {@link ChartTheme.candlestick}
(including `[top, bottom]` gradient tuples) so candle-type mini views can
share colors with the main plot.

props.name: height
props.description: Default height of the navigator strip in CSS pixels.

props.name: background
props.description: Strip background (behind the miniature series).

props.name: borderColor
props.description: Color used for the strip's top + bottom inner-shadow separators.

props.name: line
props.type: { color: string; width: number; areaTopColor: string; areaBottomColor: string; }
props.description: Line / close-price miniature color and geometry.

props.name: color
props.description: Stroke colour of the miniature line.

props.name: width
props.description: Stroke width of the miniature line in CSS pixels.

props.name: areaTopColor
props.description: Top stop of the miniature area-fill gradient.

props.name: areaBottomColor
props.description: Bottom stop of the miniature area-fill gradient.

props.name: candlestick
props.type: { up: { body: string | [string, string]; wick: string; }; down: { body: string | [string, string]; wick: string; }; }
props.description: Colors for candlestick-type miniature rendering.

props.name: up
props.description: Bullish miniature candle (close ≥ open).

props.name: body
props.description: Body fill — single colour for flat, `[top, bottom]` tuple for a vertical gradient.

props.name: wick
props.description: Wick stroke colour.

props.name: down
props.description: Bearish miniature candle (close < open).

props.name: body
props.description: Body fill — single colour for flat, `[top, bottom]` tuple for a vertical gradient.

props.name: wick
props.description: Wick stroke colour.

props.name: window
props.type: { fill: string; border: string; borderWidth: number; }
props.description: The draggable visible-range window indicator.

props.name: fill
props.description: Fill inside the visible-range window. Usually a translucent tint.

props.name: border
props.description: Stroke colour around the window.

props.name: borderWidth
props.description: Stroke width of the window border in CSS pixels.

props.name: handle
props.description: Left/right resize handles on the window edges.

props.name: color
props.description: Stroke colour of the handle marker.

props.name: width
props.description: Handle marker width in CSS pixels.

props.name: mask
props.description: Dim overlay covering the regions outside the window.

props.name: fill
props.description: Fill of the dim overlay applied to regions outside the window.

props.name: variant
props.description: 'line' (default) or 'bar'

props.name: valuePosition
props.description: Where to show the value label

props.name: formatValue
props.description: Custom format for the value

props.name: label
props.description: Label text above the value

props.name: sublabel
props.description: Sublabel text below the value (defaults to the change %)

props.name: color
props.description: Line/bar color override (defaults to theme)

props.name: negativeColor
props.description: Secondary color for negative bars

props.name: area
props.description: Show area fill under line

props.name: visible
props.description: Whether the area fill is rendered under the sparkline. Defaults to `true`.

props.name: width
props.description: Chart width (default: 140)

props.name: height
props.description: Overall height (default: 48)

props.name: strokeWidth
props.description: Stroke width in CSS pixels (default: 1.5)

props.name: gradient
props.description: Show chart background gradient (default: true)

props.name: style
props.description: Container style override

ChartContainer.description:
Top-level React wrapper that creates a {@link ChartInstance} and provides it to children via context.
Owns the DOM container and canvas lifecycle; renders children as an overlay layer.

Detects `<Title>`, `<InfoBar>`, and `<Legend>` children and positions them as:
  - Title + InfoBar — absolutely-positioned *overlays* stacked at the top of the canvas
    block, so the canvas (and therefore the grid) fills the full container height. The stacked
    height is measured and fed back into `chart.setPadding({ top })` so series data stays below
    them.
  - Legend — flex sibling at the bottom (or right, when `position="right"`), so its height is
    reserved by browser layout.

props.name: children
props.description: Series components and UI overlays (Tooltip, TimeAxis, etc.) rendered inside the chart.

props.name: theme
props.description: Visual theme. Changing this at runtime will update all themed elements.

props.name: background
props.description: Page/container background

props.name: chartGradient
props.description: Chart area gradient [top, bottom] — subtle vignette for depth

props.name: typography
props.description: Font family and base size used across the chart's text.

props.name: fontFamily
props.description: CSS `font-family` stack applied to all text rendered by the chart.

props.name: fontSize
props.description: Base body font size — titles, infobar, pie tooltip/legend default to this.

props.name: grid
props.description: Grid line appearance in the chart area.

props.name: color
props.description: Grid line stroke colour.

props.name: style
props.description: Grid line dash pattern.

props.name: candlestick
props.type: { up: { body: string | [string, string]; wick: string; }; down: { body: string | [string, string]; wick: string; }; }
props.description:
OHLC candlestick colors. `wick` defaults to `body` in {@link createTheme }
when omitted, so most presets only need to set the body colors.

`body` shape encodes the fill: a single color renders flat; a
`[top, bottom]` tuple renders a 2-stop vertical gradient. Presets that
want the subtle lightened/darkened look pass `autoGradient(color)`.

props.description: Body fill — single colour for flat, `[top, bottom]` tuple for a 2-stop vertical gradient.

props.name: wick
props.description: Wick stroke colour.

props.name: down
props.description: Bearish candle (close < open).

props.name: body
props.description: Body fill — single colour for flat, `[top, bottom]` tuple for a 2-stop vertical gradient.

props.name: wick
props.description: Wick stroke colour.

props.name: line
props.type: { color: string; width: number; areaTopColor: string; areaBottomColor: string; }
props.description: Default line series appearance including area gradient fill.

props.name: areaTopColor
props.description: Top stop of the area-fill vertical gradient (closest to the line).

props.name: areaBottomColor
props.description: Bottom stop of the area-fill vertical gradient (closest to the X axis).

props.name: seriesColors
props.description: Color palette for multi-series charts (stacked bars, overlays).

props.name: bands
props.description: Bollinger band / envelope fill colors.

props.name: upper
props.description: Fill for the upper band region (above the middle band).

props.name: lower
props.description: Fill for the lower band region (below the middle band).

props.name: crosshair
props.type: { color: string; labelBackground: string; labelTextColor: string; }
props.description: Crosshair line and axis label styling.

props.name: color
props.description: Stroke colour of the crosshair lines.

props.name: labelBackground
props.description: Background fill of the X/Y axis label pills shown at the crosshair position.

props.name: labelTextColor
props.description: Text colour inside the crosshair axis label pills.

props.name: axis
props.type: { fontSize: number; textColor: string; x?: { fontSize?: number; textColor?: string; }; y?: { fontSize?: number; textColor?: string; }; }
props.description:
Axis tick styling. `fontSize` and `textColor` are the shared defaults used
for both X and Y, as well as non-axis label surfaces (legend, crosshair

props.name: fontSize
props.description: Default tick-label font size shared by both axes.

props.description:
Navigator strip shown below the main chart — a miniature overview with a
draggable window indicating the visible range.

The `candlestick` shape mirrors the root {@link ChartTheme.candlestick}
(including `[top, bottom]` gradient tuples) so candle-type mini views can
share colors with the main plot.

props.name: height
props.description: Default height of the navigator strip in CSS pixels.

props.name: background
props.description: Strip background (behind the miniature series).

props.name: borderColor
props.description: Color used for the strip's top + bottom inner-shadow separators.

props.name: line
props.type: { color: string; width: number; areaTopColor: string; areaBottomColor: string; }
props.description: Line / close-price miniature color and geometry.

props.name: color
props.description: Stroke colour of the miniature line.

props.name: width
props.description: Stroke width of the miniature line in CSS pixels.

props.name: areaTopColor
props.description: Top stop of the miniature area-fill gradient.

props.name: areaBottomColor
props.description: Bottom stop of the miniature area-fill gradient.

props.name: candlestick
props.type: { up: { body: string | [string, string]; wick: string; }; down: { body: string | [string, string]; wick: string; }; }
props.description: Colors for candlestick-type miniature rendering.

props.name: up
props.description: Bullish miniature candle (close ≥ open).

props.name: body
props.description: Body fill — single colour for flat, `[top, bottom]` tuple for a vertical gradient.

props.name: wick
props.description: Wick stroke colour.

props.name: down
props.description: Bearish miniature candle (close < open).

props.name: body
props.description: Body fill — single colour for flat, `[top, bottom]` tuple for a vertical gradient.

props.name: wick
props.description: Wick stroke colour.

props.name: window
props.type: { fill: string; border: string; borderWidth: number; }
props.description: The draggable visible-range window indicator.

props.name: fill
props.description: Fill inside the visible-range window. Usually a translucent tint.

props.name: border
props.description: Stroke colour around the window.

props.name: borderWidth
props.description: Stroke width of the window border in CSS pixels.

props.name: handle
props.description: Left/right resize handles on the window edges.

props.name: color
props.description: Stroke colour of the handle marker.

props.name: width
props.description: Handle marker width in CSS pixels.

props.name: mask
props.description: Dim overlay covering the regions outside the window.

props.name: fill
props.description: Fill of the dim overlay applied to regions outside the window.

props.name: axis
props.description: Grouped axis configuration (Y/X visibility, bounds, sizing).

props.name: y
props.description: Y-axis configuration — width, bounds, and visibility of the value axis.

props.name: width
props.description: Width in CSS pixels. Default: 55.

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum bound. Default: 'auto'.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum bound. Default: 'auto'.

props.name: visible
props.description: Whether the axis is visible. Default: true. When false, width is treated as 0.

props.name: x
props.description: X-axis configuration — height and visibility of the time axis.

props.name: height
props.description: Height in CSS pixels. Default: 30.

props.name: visible
props.description: Whether the axis is visible. Default: true. When false, height is treated as 0.

props.name: padding
props.type: { top?: number; bottom?: number; right?: number | { intervals: number }; left?: number | { intervals: number }; }
props.defaultValue: { top: 20, bottom: 20, right: { intervals: 3 }, left: { intervals: 0 } }
props.description:
Viewport padding around the plot area. Applied on mount only — changing
this prop after mount is ignored. Set every side to `0` for an
edge-to-edge sparkline.

props.name: top
props.description: Pixels of empty space above the plot area. Default `20`.

props.name: bottom
props.description: Pixels of empty space below the plot area. Default `20`.

props.name: right
props.description:
Empty space on the right edge. A `number` is pixels (e.g. `50`); an
object pads by data intervals on the time axis (e.g. `{ intervals: 3 }`
leaves room for three more bars/candles past the latest point). Default
`{ intervals: 3 }`.

props.name: left
props.description:
Empty space on the left edge. A `number` is pixels; an object pads by
data intervals on the time axis. Default `{ intervals: 0 }`.

props.name: gradient
props.description: Show the chart background gradient. Defaults to true.

props.name: interactive
props.description: Enable zoom, pan, and crosshair interactions. Defaults to true.

props.name: grid
props.description: Background grid configuration. Default: `{ visible: true }`.

props.name: visible
props.description: Whether the background grid is rendered. Default: `true`.

props.name: headerLayout
props.description:
How `<Title>` and `<InfoBar>` are positioned relative to the canvas.
- `'overlay'` (default): absolute overlays on top of the canvas — the grid
  and Y-axis labels render full-height behind the header strip.
- `'inline'`: flex siblings above the canvas — the canvas (and grid) are
  shifted down by the measured header height, so nothing renders behind
  the title. The chart background still spans the full container.

props.name: animations
props.description:
Chart-level animation configuration. See {@link AnimationsConfig} for the
full shape.

Two layers — remember which is which:

- **Chart-level (this prop)** — `animations.points.{enterMs, smoothMs,
  pulseMs}` and `animations.viewport.{reboundMs, yAxisMs,
  inputResponseMs}`. Acts as the default for every series.
- **Per-series** — `<LineSeries options={{ entryMs, smoothMs, pulseMs }}>`
  (and the analogous CandlestickSeries / BarSeries options). Overrides
  the chart-level default for that one series. Note the spelling:
  `entryMs` per-series, `enterMs` chart-level — historical artefact,
  both refer to the same animation.

Resolution: per-series option wins over chart-level numeric value.
Chart-level wins only when its category is explicitly `false` — that's
a hard disable that overrides per-series too.

Shorthands:
- `true` / omitted — built-in defaults (every settling animation 250 ms,
  pulse cycle 600 ms, input ease 0 / off).
- `false` — disables every animation category.
- `{ points: false }` / `{ viewport: false }` — disables a category.

Runtime updates: changing this prop after mount calls
`chart.setAnimations(...)` so the new durations take effect on the next
animation / render.

props.name: perf
props.description:
Enable runtime performance instrumentation. Off by default.

- `true` — attach a {@link PerfMonitor } and render a visible HUD overlay on this chart.
- `{ hud: true, windowMs, maxSamples, ... }` — same, with monitor options.
- `{ hud: false, monitor }` — attach to an existing monitor without rendering the HUD.

Only read at mount; changing this prop after the chart is created is ignored.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline style for the chart's outer wrapper element.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra class for the chart's outer wrapper element.

props.name: labelCount
props.description: Desired number of labels (≥ 2). Overrides chart-level `axis.x.labelCount`.

props.name: minLabelSpacing
props.description: Minimum pixel gap between adjacent labels (hard floor). Overrides chart-level.

props.name: format
props.description:
Custom tick-label formatter. When supplied, overrides the built-in
range-adaptive formatter for this axis.

props.name: labelCount
props.description:
Desired number of labels (≥ 2). Overrides any chart-level `axis.y.labelCount`.
Realized count may differ ±1 after the 1-2-5 snap.

props.name: minLabelSpacing
props.description: Minimum pixel gap between adjacent labels (hard floor). Overrides chart-level.

Tooltip.description:
Floating near-cursor glass tooltip that appears while hovering the chart.

Hover-only: without a crosshair position, the component renders `null`.
The companion {@link InfoBar } shows last-known values when no hover is active.

props.name: sort
props.description: Sort order for line values (default: 'none').

props.name: format
props.description:
Custom formatter for every displayed number in the default UI. Called per
row with the field hint (`'open' | 'high' | 'low' | 'close' | 'volume' | 'value'`).
Defaults: adaptive precision for ohlc/value, compact (K/M/B/T) for volume.
Ignored when {@link children} is a render-prop.

props.name: children
props.description:
Render-prop escape hatch. Receives the hover snapshots and replaces the
built-in panel contents. The floating container (positioning, blur glass,
clamping) is preserved — use
[`computeTooltipPosition`](../../core/src/tooltip-position.ts) directly if
you need your own container.

props.name: items
props.description:
Static override for auto-detected items. Renders a non-interactive legend
with just swatch + label. Ignored when {@link children} is a render-prop.

props.name: position
props.description: Layout position. Default: 'bottom'.

props.name: mode
props.description: Click behavior for the built-in UI. Default: `'toggle'`. Ignored when {@link children} is provided.

props.name: children
props.description:
Render-prop escape hatch. Receives the computed `items` (each carrying
its own `toggle()` / `isolate()` closures) and fully replaces the
built-in flex row / column. Callers can filter, reorder, and re-style
without reimplementing visibility wiring.

Navigator.description:
Miniature navigator strip with a draggable window indicator for the main
chart's visible range. Must be rendered as a child of `<ChartContainer>`
so the chart instance is available via context.

`ChartContainer` sifts this element out of its children and places it as a
flex sibling below the canvas area — it does not render inline.

props.name: data
height
props.description: Strip height in CSS pixels. Defaults to `theme.navigator.height` (60).

props.name: style
props.description: Style override for the outer wrapper div.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra class on the outer wrapper div.

Title.description:
Chart title / subtitle bar rendered as a flex row above the chart canvas
(above {@link InfoBar } when both are present). Hoisted out of the
overlay layer by {@link ChartContainer }, so browser flex layout reserves
its height and ResizeObserver drives a Y-range recompute.

Place it at the top of a chart's children — its slot in the DOM is
determined by `ChartContainer`, not by source order:
```tsx
<ChartContainer>
  <Title sub="Live Candlestick">BTC/USD</Title>
  <InfoBar />
  <CandlestickSeries data={data} />
  ...
</ChartContainer>
```

props.name: children
props.description: Primary label (e.g. "BTC/USD").

props.name: sub
props.description:
Secondary label rendered in a muted colour next to the primary one (e.g.
"Live Candlestick", "1m", series count).

props.name: style
props.description: Extra styles merged onto the flex row.

InfoBar.description:
Compact OHLC/series info bar rendered as a flex row above the chart canvas.
Pairs with {@link Tooltip } (which then only renders its floating near-cursor part).

Pass a render-prop child for a custom layout — the built-in UI is used when
{@link children} is omitted.

props.name: sort
props.description: Sort order for line values (default: 'none').

props.name: format
props.description:
Custom formatter for every displayed number in the default UI. Called per
cell with the field hint (`'open' | 'high' | 'low' | 'close' | 'volume' | 'value'`).
Defaults: adaptive precision for ohlc/value, compact (K/M/B/T) for volume.
Ignored when {@link children} is a render-prop.

props.name: children
props.description:
Render-prop escape hatch. Receives the computed snapshots and replaces the
entire built-in layout. Filter, reorder, or re-style rows here without
re-implementing any data wiring.

props.name: seriesId
props.description:
Owning series id. **Optional** — when omitted, the first visible pie
series is picked.

props.name: mode
props.description: Default: `'both'`. See {@link PieLegendMode}.

props.name: format
props.description: Custom formatter for the absolute slice value. Default: shared `formatCompact`.

props.name: position
props.description: Layout placement. Default: `'bottom'`. See {@link PieLegendPosition}.

props.name: children
props.description: Render-prop escape hatch. Receives slices + mode + format, replaces default UI.

PieTooltip.description: Tooltip for pie/donut charts. Shows hovered slice label, value, and percentage.

props.name: seriesId
props.description:
Owning series id. **Optional** — when omitted, the first visible pie
series is picked.

props.name: format
props.description: Custom formatter for the slice value. Default: shared `formatCompact`.

props.name: children
props.description: Render-prop escape hatch — receives hover info + format, replaces default UI.

props.name: value
props.description: Numeric value to display. Each digit that changes between renders animates with a vertical spin.

props.name: format
props.description:
Value-to-string formatter. Defaults to the current locale's
`Intl.NumberFormat` when omitted. Pass the shared `formatCompact` /
`formatPriceAdaptive` helpers or your own function to customize.

`Intl.NumberFormatOptions` is also accepted (legacy) — it's routed
through the built-in `Intl.NumberFormat` for back-compat with callers
from before this prop was a function.

props.name: locale
props.description: BCP 47 locale tag used by the default formatter. Defaults to `'en-US'`.

props.name: spinDuration
props.description: Per-digit spin animation duration in milliseconds. Defaults to `350`.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra class on the root `<span>`.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline style on the root `<span>`. Useful for `fontVariantNumeric: 'tabular-nums'`.

props.name: seriesId
props.description:
Owning series id. **Optional** — when omitted, the first visible
single-layer time series is picked, falling back to the first visible
multi-layer time series. `null` (no compatible series) renders nothing.

props.name: color
props.description: Override badge color (e.g. line color). If not set, uses up/down/neutral from theme.

props.name: format
props.description:
Custom formatter. Routed through NumberFlow as its `format` prop so the
digit-by-digit animation still plays on the output string — NumberFlow
animates whichever characters the formatter returns.

props.name: children
props.description:
Render-prop escape hatch. Receives the resolved value, pixel position, and
direction metadata. Replaces the built-in badge + dashed line entirely.
